prompt:
You are a design layout analyst. Look at this rendered design template and count the total number of distinct visual elements you can see (text blocks, images, decorative shapes, icons, frames, etc.).

Do NOT count the background canvas itself.

Respond with ONLY a single integer. Do not include any explanation or extra text.
